scripts.add: node generate.js && node generate-screenshots.js && git add src/templates/ "data csv/" public/previews/ package.json && git commit -m "Auto-sync templates and screenshots" && git pull --rebase && git push
scripts.auto-sync: node generate.js && git add src/templates/ "data csv/" public/previews/ && git commit -m "Auto-sync templates from local" && git pull --rebase && git push
scripts.build: node generate.js && node push-registry.js && vite build
